{
  "done": false,
  "title": "Demystifying Docker: Containers, Images, and Dockerfiles",
  "scope": "Establish a fast, practical mental model of what containers are and how they differ from traditional VMs. Then, introduce the core artifacts: how Docker images use a layered system and the essentials of writing a Dockerfile to package a web application.",
  "concepts": [
    "Containers vs VMs",
    "Docker images and the layer system",
    "Dockerfile basics"
  ],
  "estimatedSections": 2
}
